violations.text: The establishment does not have an approved HACCP Plan for juicing/bottling. Documents and application for HACCP Plan left with person in charge. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
A vector light was observed to be plugged above the prep table. A vector light shall be installed in a manner that does not contaminate food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. A copy was provided and left on the premises with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking the proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
